prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年吉林省理科（物理类）最低录取位次依次为约9398名→9354名→→8584名→7806名，整体呈明显前移趋势（位次数字减小=竞争加剧），近两年累计前移约778名；2025年基准位次约7806名，为近五年最高水平；该校在吉林省理科（物理类）招生计划2021年51人、2022年43人、2024年55人、2025年55人；2026年计划54人，较2025年减少1人，小幅缩招约1.8%，对竞争有轻微加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，与大连理工大学本部共享排名；软科中国大学主榜2026年约第28名，近年排名稳定在28–32名区间，属于国内顶尖工科院校；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号；抖音综合热度排名第55位（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度尚可；历史投档异常记录中2023年大连理工大学电信学部曾出现位次断档至60000名的情况，但盘锦校区在吉林省未出现明显断档；化学工程与技术A+（全国顶尖）、力学A、机械工程A、土木工程A、工商管理A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A；盘锦校区招生专业以能源化学工程（化学工程与技术A+相关）、生物科学类、环境生态工程（环境科学与工程A-相关）、经济学类、海洋技术等为主，学科底蕴深厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 能源化学工程、生物科学类等专业属于生化环材大类，社会热度整体偏冷（明显劝退），但依托大连理工大学A+学科平台仍具吸引力；经济学类（金融/财经/经济）社会热度分化观望；电子信息/通信类（海洋技术、智能海洋装备等）社会热度高热推荐；吉林省2026年高考总报名人数约110868人，按近年物理类占比约72%估算，物理类考生约79936人，较2025年物理类80421人基本持平略降，竞争压力未显著增加；该校位于辽宁省盘锦市，与吉林省相邻，东北地区考生对大连理工大学（盘锦校区）认可度较高；该校在吉林省招生计划占比较小（约1–2%），地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7806名、2026年计划小幅缩招（54人较55人减少1人）、吉林省考生总数基本稳定、学校985层次吸引力持续、声誉偏负面但未出现明显断档信号、以及2026年新增智能海洋装备和生物制造等新工科专业可能提升报考热度等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将进一步前移至约7650名，区间7400–7900名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 能源化学工程（含能源化学工程、化学工程与工业生物工程）
- 智能海洋装备（2026年新增专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 海洋技术
- 生物信息学
- 生物制造（2026年新增专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济学类（电子商务、经济学）
- 环境生态工程（2024年曾招生，2026年计划中未出现）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7400–7900名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（7400名以内）可重点冲刺能源化学工程（A+学科）等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（7900名附近）建议以经济学类、海洋技术等作为稳妥选择。2026年新增智能海洋装备、生物制造等专业，报考时可结合个人兴趣与行业前景综合考量。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science (physics category) in Jilin Province were approximately 9398 → 9354 → 8584 → 7806, showing a clear upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers indicate intensified competition), with a cumulative increase of about 778 places in the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7806, the highest in the past five years; the enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province for science (physics category) was 51 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 55 in 2024, and 55 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 54, a decrease of 1 compared to 2025, a slight reduction of about 1.8%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, sharing rankings with the main campus of Dalian University of Technology; ranked approximately 28th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 28–32 range in recent years, belonging to top domestic engineering universities; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving signals of admission cut-off anomalies; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 55th (relatively hot), with medium to high exposure on short video platforms, and moderate application attention; historical admission anomalies include a ranking cut-off to 60,000 in 2023 for the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering of Dalian University of Technology, but no obvious cut-off occurred for the Panjin Campus in Jilin Province; Chemical Engineering and Technology is A+ (top in the country), Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A; the Panjin Campus offers majors such as Energy Chemical Engineering (related to Chemical Engineering and Technology A+), Biological Sciences, Environmental Ecological Engineering (related to Environmental Science and Engineering A-), Economics, and Marine Technology, with deep academic foundations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Energy Chemical Engineering and Biological Sciences fall under the broad categories of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials, which are generally less popular socially (clearly discouraged), but still attractive due to the A+ discipline platform of Dalian University of Technology; Economics (finance/economics) has divided social popularity; Electronic Information/Communication (Marine Technology, Intelligent Marine Equipment, etc.) is highly recommended with high social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jilin Province college entrance exam is about 110,868, with an estimated 79,936 physics category candidates based on the recent proportion of about 72%, which is roughly stable compared to 80,421 in 2025, so competition pressure has not significantly increased; the university is located in Panjin City, Liaoning Province, adjacent to Jilin Province, and candidates from the Northeast region have a high recognition of Dalian University of Technology (Panjin Campus); the enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province accounts for a small proportion (about 1–2%), so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 7806 in 2025, a slight reduction in the 2026 plan (54 compared to 55, a decrease of 1), a basically stable total number of candidates in Jilin Province, sustained attractiveness of the 985 university level, a somewhat negative reputation but no obvious cut-off signals, and the addition of new engineering majors like Intelligent Marine Equipment and Biomanufacturing in 2026 which may increase application enthusiasm, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will further move forward to about 7650, with a range of 7400–7900.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Energy Chemical Engineering (including Energy Chemical Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Industrial Bioengineering)
- Intelligent Marine Equipment (new major in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Marine Technology
- Bioinformatics
- Biomanufacturing (new major in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (E-commerce, Economics)
- Environmental Ecological Engineering (recruited in 2024, not appearing in the 2026 plan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7400–7900, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 7400), you can focus on top majors like Energy Chemical Engineering (A+ discipline); if your ranking is close to the upper limit (around 7900), it is advisable to choose Economics or Marine Technology as stable options. For the new majors in 2026, such as Intelligent Marine Equipment and Biomanufacturing, consider combining personal interests with industry prospects when applying.
